title: Yaar Mera Titliaan Warga
overview: Yaar Mera Titliaan Warga is the story of a couple who, after 6 years of marriage, are bored with each other. To spice things up, both of them open fake Facebook accounts. But things go sideways when, accidentally, they befriend each other on FB. This "Comedy of Errors" takes them on a humorous as well as emotional ride.
